accepted_evidence: Every near hierarchy now begins at one of 234 limb-attached parent shoots; six branchlets originate at distinct positions along each parent, tertiary branches originate along branchlets, and all 19656 leaf cards retain modeled petioles.
The 24 formerly unattached near apical bundles are now explicit far-only anchors, leaving the runtime report at zero floating near cards.

Reducing near anchors from fourteen to nine per main branch lowers the branchlet mesh to 149514 source triangles while the tangential closeup makes a parent shoot and its descendants readable instead of stacking the full tree behind them.
The removed near anchors are replaced by 370 interior far-only anchors, preserving the total 90432-card far-crown budget and continuous 60 m and 150 m silhouettes.
The final UE 5.8 Metal run has zero material compile errors, zero map-check errors, zero map-check warnings, and no corridor substitution.
rejection_reasons: The closeup now exposes a cleaner hierarchy but also reveals an abrupt cylindrical main-limb cutoff and hard parent-shoot junction that do not yet read as naturally grown ramification.
Bark and interior foliage remain too dark under the fixed review photometry, obscuring fissure, taper, petiole, and leaf-surface detail.
The whole-tree crown is denser and less shelf-like, but one procedural envelope still lacks the asymmetry and damage variation required for a mature natural specimen.
Only one open-grown adult form exists; forest-grown adult, intermediate, juvenile, damaged, and deadwood variants remain absent.
No temporal wind and LOD capture, corridor ecology placement, guide or ecology review, or measured desktop and VR performance evidence exists.

review_contract.capture_redistribution: not approved; hashes and reproducible paths only are retained in the open-source repository

next_iteration_requirements: Blend primary-limb, secondary-twig, and parent-shoot radii through curved multi-segment junctions without visible cylindrical cutoffs.
Author open-grown adult, forest-grown adult, and intermediate forms with distinct live-crown ratio, branch angle, width, asymmetry, and damage parameters.
Rebalance bark and foliage photometry while preserving physically lit response and the fixed review exposure.
Repeat all five views per required crown form, then add temporal wind and LOD handoff evidence before corridor placement.
